# LaunchLift AI

LaunchLift AI is a cloud-based product for turning no-code and web apps into Android launch packages.

Primary audience:
- Lovable, Bubble, Webflow, FlutterFlow, PWA, and custom web app builders
- No-code founders who want Android packaging without learning Android Studio
- Agencies that need repeatable Android launch packages for client web apps

Core value:
- Keep the existing PWA or web app live
- Add a Google Play Android channel
- Generate launch assets, Play Store copy, data safety notes, policy drafts, native feature plans, APK/AAB build paths, signed artifact handoff, and upgrade history

Important pages:
- https://launchliftai.com/
- https://launchliftai.com/lovable-to-android
- https://launchliftai.com/bubble-to-android
- https://launchliftai.com/webflow-to-android
- https://launchliftai.com/flutterflow-web-to-android
- https://launchliftai.com/pwa-to-play-store
- https://launchliftai.com/website-to-apk-aab

Support:
- support@launchliftai.com
